title: olearia arguta
intro: Olearia arguta, also known as the New Zealand tree daisy or frost flower, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions, offering health benefits such as soothing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Olearia arguta is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications for its skin-soothing properties.
